# terrible_community_general_installp (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) One or more packages to install or remove. Use `all` to install all packages available on informed `repository_path`.

### Optional

- `accept_license` (Boolean) Whether to accept the license for the package(s).
- `repository_path` (String) Path with AIX packages (required to install).
- `state` (String) Whether the package needs to be present on or absent from the system.
